page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz, paired with 128.0 GB of system memory. The hardware configuration includes four integrated NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs, delivering a total of 64 GB of VRAM. No local storage is bundled with this instance, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates average multi-core performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 23575.63 and a PassMark CPU score of 21092.78. Single-core performance is relatively weak, as shown by a stress-ng single-core score of 1103.89 and a single-threaded gzip compression rate of 19.1 GB/sec. Memory performance is stable, with read-only large block bandwidth at 118.4 GB/sec and write large block bandwidth at 57.05 GB/sec. Database operations and web serving throughput are average, with Redis SET operations reaching 22.1 million operations per second and static web serving throughput at 15.55 GB/sec.

Given the presence of four dedicated enterprise-grade GPUs alongside 32 physical CPU cores, this instance represents a high-density resource profile. The lack of local storage requires external block storage attachment, which is a key architectural tradeoff. This instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that can fully parallelize across multiple GPUs, such as deep learning training, GPU-accelerated data science, and high-performance computing simulations, rather than single-threaded CPU tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz, 128.0 GB of RAM, and four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs providing 64 GB of total VRAM. The instance does not include local storage and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show average multi-core CPU capabilities, with a PassMark CPU score of 21092.78, alongside average memory bandwidth and database operations. However, single-core performance is weak, as evidenced by a stress-ng single-core score of 1103.89. This hardware profile is optimized for parallelized workloads, making it highly suitable for deep learning, GPU-accelerated data processing, and scientific computing, while requiring external network storage for data persistence.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server with 32 Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA V100 GPUs (64 GB VRAM), optimized for parallel computing and deep learning.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.8xlarge features 32 Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA V100 GPUs for GPU-accelerated workloads.
tagline: A quad-GPU accelerated instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and Volta architecture for parallelized compute-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: Four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs with 64 GB total VRAM
32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
Best suited for deep learning, parallel data processing, and scientific simulations
